h24c0c901g0926g4ddfg8891gbd320763d4de: I don't want a crumb left on that plate, girl.
h319da457ga4e3g4c11g9a7ag3eaa5fc0c2b8: Auntie Ethel, please. One more bite and this pie is gonna come back up to say hello.
h27829800g84b9g45e1ga4ccge66b1d4dfe15: Don't make me get the wooden spoon. You're eating for two, so get to it!
ha600b302g24afg4ae6g9820gf8fd30780609: If it isn't the cheekiest pup of them all...
hcdb26611g5c41g415dg9b24g0bbb39871cbc: You'd best have one hells of an apology for me, young man.
h7f77461eg88deg462dg82fbgb680d24fe73a: You'd best have one hells of an apology for me, young lady.
h7b9f12c7g4fc7g4102g9b6dg7a294340e2e6: I'm sorry. I shouldn't have raised a hand against you.
h482b57f2g9e23g4adfgac13g7c9cd4dd6839: I'm sorry. I should have stepped in.
h4be2ab49gff9cg41fbgb1d1g544a97c00f19: You'll get no apology from me, hag.
hcb6cedc6g839dg4876g9e1bg8bfd92e7f900: Hah! Oh, I do like the mouthy ones.
h6d56c350g7a7eg43e7g94dfg2e3ad7125b1f: You know, I was gonna give you a swift kick up the arse and show you the door...
hb8ed491bgd198g49dbg8bc9gbbcc083316fd: ... but I think you and I could have a bit of fun together.
ha7591b77gc117g4a9ag9aa8g9147db9d038f: Gods, grant me patience... Eat up, Mayrina! I won't say it again.
h0966b093g3f14g425bg9534g7c9ec8426219: That's Mayrina? I have some bad news for her.
h259726afg6885g438ag8f38gd14bebdb408c: Keep that hole under your nose shut. Or things will get messy.
h01ca0434g7363g4b7fgb76fg59c2dc651020: Don't bother. You'd only subject us to her inevitable wailing.
h5ef2b8ccg9ba9g4a9fg9efbgace1cb6a6054: What is it? What's going on?
h9d8703ebg528fg4781g9ba0g6a0a6acc216c: Nothing. I mistook you for someone else.
h9d4bb59cga2b0g4e25gaad7g9c79eedddb79: You just have one of those faces, Mayrina. So bland and forgettable.
h383509e4g7b95g452fg9b52gf1418eff0d2a: Now, about what you told me in the grove - your little wriggler problem.
ha656a6a0gf8f3g4031g9dc6gd5614741334a: It must be an awful thing to have hanging over your head - or in it, rather. Let me take care of that for you.
he92e8462g950dg459bga8f7gd7bc1d863b64: If you have this power, why didn't you remove it at the grove?
hcf02e184g9b3fg4b4ag90aagee64f6caf044: Prying eyes. I didn't need those druids in my business.
hfc846d39gf7f6g4defgaddbg219be33d82f0: I'm not sure I want your help anymore.
hd8007376g0806g42feg9f8cga373951358bc: Now, about that wriggler of yours.
hd42b876eg2c9dg48a1gb1e4g67e458562cc6: Now, I can tell you're in dire need of help, petal.
he9d2c747gb357g4172ga493g2615a584b901: That wriggler swimming in your brain juice is a bit of an inconvenience, isn't it?
ha06909b7g015fg4a7eg848ag3bfc27217a06: Are you saying you can remove it?
h393ae841gc892g401ag8a98g7dc637b4860e: You don't need to bear the brunt of this alone, precious. Auntie Ethel is here for you.
ha6345e76g125eg4c9egb774g6ae74b9c1355: Because you stink. And I know the stench of mind flayer anywhere.
h4bcd6190g4482g435dgb616ga73245a8be3f: No, but it is yours. And if I were you, I would be very concerned.
haaeae356ga04dg4bedg9505g3dd3c80fd863: Don't change the subject. Why is that woman really here?
hc9176acbg5b2dg4b4cg8befg7f1bf9e65c0c: I told you - the girl is none of your business. Keep that hole under your nose shut.
h2b65c2eegf37eg41b9gb978g3a837c2019e6: Must you stick out your neck for every dimwit in distress?
hcf93371bg9eb2g451dg81d0g6189d22451a3: I'll talk about your wriggler - and that's it. Last warning.
habb5db22g120cg4978ga9a1gd318c29b740c: No. This woman is clearly in trouble.
h2e7befdbg190fg4225g9eddgddb60e03c37f: You want to play the hero so badly? Fine. Let's make this interesting.
h2b3f3de1g51fdg4af0g97fbg8f313f7d24c1: Fine. Can you remove the parasite?
h7ef39c3agf849g4b3fg851ag604a2f9861b5: Quicker than you can say 'Yes, Auntie.'
hedc562f6g105ag4a4dg827fgcea621661ecd: What do you say? Want me to take care of the little bugger?
hbee01e04g7955g4529g904agc740cadbe49f: I know a devil that's offered to remove it.
ha9db8083gf384g4a73gb4f4g76bed196c767: A devil? Spare me. Blathering windbags in love with the sound of their own voices.
hbe00a890gcde9g4fdfgb8d9g9ccc602d05e4: I'm the safer bet. Plus - you'll get to keep your soul.
h4c22aafag62dcg49dcg9fafg6d4e49999274: Well, that depends on the job. Removing a parasite is no small feat. But I like you, petal. So I'll only ask for something small...
hf7eb35a5g3ce4g4d67g91e5g14d514a8fb1f: One of your pretty little peepers.
h595ea3e5g2b73g44d2gb034gd02d3a462a26: Oh dear, you don't have one to spare. Terribly sorry, petal - but no deal for you.
h88abe2bdgb770g4fbdg9cd6geae90de8d11b: Should you know someone with two eyes in their head and a wriggler problem, send them my way. Auntie will sort them out.
hdce6822egf74cg47a9g9befg8f68ee54555b: I'll pluck it from your head, kiss it for luck, then back in it goes. Won't take but a moment.
h9673c41aga3f3g44ecg802fg364d66e1499d: That is my price. Nothing more, nothing less.
h0f1aaabcgf424g4469ga6f3g5a1971dd4e9b: I'm afraid that's my business, petal. It's nothing nefarious though - I promise.
h054ee299g3078g4d12gb810g1cd1545b1e34: A touch. But sure you've two eyes in your skull, don't you? No need to be precious.
habf58a93g2ed0g4b0dg95a2g557c74378fb1: Glorious. One moment, Auntie needs her real nails for this.
he31ec677gb67bg40aegaee2g2d107c7c36d0: That's a poor bargain. I'll try my luck elsewhere.
h7695ce4cg3648g47d7g835cgde004d26b3ee: And you - my door is always open, petal. Auntie Ethel is here for you.
hd7e85807g242cg4a27gbc2fgd1c4cdb61071: As you wish - but should you change your mind, you know where to find me.
h7883df62gbab8g420cg8161g1cd5e044555d: This sounds like a spell for a Hag Eye - you want to see through one of my eyes.
hd84e52f9g5fcdg4fa3ga44ag362cc25e5c30: Hah! Not many know that spell. You're close, but not quite right.
hfd1bd8f3ga9e7g4a3dga379g36bc7fa63b3c: Your eyeball is staying in your head - although it would look delightful on a necklace.
h9c02b5b6g39c2g4966g8040g229425d050f7: Ta ta, petal. Come see Auntie soon.
hd6b384c0gab2fg4147g8378g7959a6b961da: Yes. Get this damn parasite out of me.
h15aa6716g0bb4g4771ga124g813ec4f4d46f: My - I do like them eager. But know that I don't work for free. I expect payment up front...
hca50f743gc706g40b6ga1f0g65aff750ed48: I'll take my chances on my own.
h228f5b7dgf8adg4babga2aeg1967dc1593c9: Hah! Good luck with that. But don't you fret, petal - I'm sure you'll make a very pretty mind flayer.
h79b6a6d6g73beg4241gb845g5c6369efe37a: Such things are rarely done for free. What's the real bargain here?
haa830977g043cg4348g811bgc0b35b67488d: You're a sharp one. I am proposing a deal, but it's different from your little pact. You see, I prefer personal things.
he56b7860g62f3g4321gb06cgff2885d0767f: I'll find another way to take care of it.
h2168f47fg9025g41f2ga195g66e1b0f88d48: Yes, because everyone and their mother is an expert on illithid scum.
h674b52d3g0da2g49eegafbagc846488e2757: I can tell you're almost done cooking. You know you could turn - just like that.
hb266c7dbg2f86g4360gb8e7g14f751ee41df: I'm inclined to agree. Let's not involve ourselves in this place any more than necessary.
h734b41b8g7078g423agbee3g8136e793f18d: |Something isn't right here. This girl is in toruble.|
h4360a52eg0828g49fcg8ae4g8d3ef71b17e8: Let's not make trouble for some stranger. We have our own problems.
h19d3e958g2105g407agbe43g92b41d2f1970: |I know trouble when I see it - and that girl is neck deep in it.|
h5c072eabg355cg41a1gbd0bg8b1005cfbecf: The girl's in a fix. It's a hero's duty to step in.
hdac6f3d3gd5abg4371gb9e2g8cc737b0dde0: She's a pregnant lady in distress. We can't just stand by and pretend she's not here.
h3a70ee33g69d5g49a4g8551g24ec3a26c2ec: Something isn't right. That woman - why is she with you?
hf7b994aegdbf4g4fe7ga50dg644e617632d7: Busybodies are not appreciated around here.
h1994536bgd7b3g4422g852ag1edd98c04a53: Your brothers are dead - by my hand.
hdd0cfe65g4974g4ae4g82b7g3831d00b7549: I gutted your brothers. There was blood everywhere.
hc8e6fe18ge3fdg4fb8ga195g6f94c7131621: I pray for your forgiveness. I fought your brothers and killed them.
h78fd37b9gf531g4b80gacc3g6e997719e457: Hah! You want to play it like that? Fine. Yes, girl - I killed your brothers.
hddfc716fgec1dg4706gb1b4g8564a836b1a1: That can't be true. Auntie Ethel?
h825f05cdgc400g4a93gad73gd15f9b7d5626: They were being rude. And I detest rudeness.
h9a9a423cg02a8g4c43g8235g34ab0f985ae7: You MONSTER. The deal is off!
hb23b5204ga4f2g438bg8b4fg317ba63a29bf: Blessed silence at last. Some time in the cage should do her good.
h0b4cbc3eg84d8g4d4fg8d7dg471f66d551a0: And you - you'll regret sticking your nose in my business.
h435f2711g157dg406cgaf88g2cb7112c3fac: Mayrina, my darling, it's not true. No - this scoundrel cut your brothers down. It was awful. So much blood.
ha44ba769ga8ccg4e0cg9eceg7a0ddee5855f: I found your brothers dead outside.
hee327f1bg533eg45e4gaaa7g1db3aa99ca21: Yes, your brothers are dead. And before you ask - yes, I killed them.
ha9b85697gd712g4ebfgb327gb8f67755c406: You know what that sounds like to me? Leverage.

hc0263247g8b58g4c99g9611g1cf3c0d8ed01: Well, you heard the lady. We don't want things to get 'messy'.
h945a08a7g8625g457cg903fg0d5beaf46bad: Spill it. Mayrina deserves the truth.
h5aef93b2geafeg4d4dg8432g1f013e3ceda3: The choice is yours. There's really no good decision to be made here.
he3cee329g9709g43c6gb991g080e2e70c29b: That's Mayrina? Where are her brothers?
h0f25331dg82f7g4407g970cg9c69967b69bc: They stopped by to pass on their congratulations. Said they'll be waiting for you at home.
h125123ffgd8beg4eefg995cgf0b667190309: Oh. But why didn't they come in to see me?
hd8c7372eg4302g40f2g9a62g584639c0fdcf: All they left was a message, which I passed on, didn't I? Don't be stressing.
he6261231g066ag4993gb988g0d28b3b2560a: And you. Hush. Don't be upsetting the girl with such things.
hc1462753gc21ag4265g817eg0f8c4333de35: Answer the question: Where are her brothers?
hade786aag6a4fg44a9ga4e5g789e13f05d4f: You cheeky thing. Sutton Farm. North of Baldur's Gate. Check if you like.
h5e62e77fgaf64g4fd9gbb2fg31cd8f4d9cba: But I think you have bigger problems.
h469a913ag5a8bg409fgae61geb27a8172985: Besides, you should save your energy for that wriggler swimming in your brain juice. Fierce inconvenient, isn't it?

h9c358c87g45d1g432fg8e43g38477d4b4ead: Then you don't know her like I do. She's getting exactly what she wanted. Don't you fret.
h04d91cf7gde72g4665ga8b8g6c161ea993c2: We missed out on introductions. Who are you?
h09725dfag1da0g4024ga675gf03d414c6cfa: I have many names, petal. But Auntie Ethel will do.
h5c3cdb39gdbcdg429aga54fg692e2ae698e0: Interesting place you have, right in the middle of nowhere.
h2a24c6cbg6d43g4779g90f0g80d239730e1c: Beautiful, isn't it? It's my little refuge for the lost and hopeless.
h8ebb3b19gde1ag49c5g9b02g0a225472e8ad: Did you have any trouble on the way here?
hc6e9f203gb410g4d7eg9cc6geb3b438b4d30: None that I couldn't handle, precious.
h051a810egef6dg45f7g9a31g5d70a4fb0463: I'm glad you got here safely.
h298064d4g4724g4aa6gb7d7gcc9d0880a078: Thanks to you. You know you're lucky - you've helped a very powerful lady.

hc5e15bddg3641g46f3ga69cgaf8ff09cbb7a: Keep your own little nose in your own little dish, petal.
hcf660fdeg11d1g40cfgb269geba7261e76a6: Do you treat all your guests so poorly?
h750ff0dfg5c6cg4124gbbfdg4a30eabedfdd: This is why I like you, petal. You say what's on your mind.
hed5058fcg1edcg41c9gb61fgaf8b4fc8025a: I was hoping you'd pay me a visit. You see, I do more than lotions and potions.
h671f1497ga7d8g4947g924bgeeed9d568758: People in dire need travel from all over Faerûn to see little 'ol me. And I do my damndest to help them.
h76393aa2g321eg4b43g9351gea0dee8ed25f: And you, petal - well, you need a lot of help.
hd367c742gb999g4d01ga5feg14d88040388b: Forgive me if I get a bit sharp. My work wears something awful on me.
h1e435216gf2eeg4da2g9fddg41fc8997f0d4: You see, I help people from all over Faerûn.
hdc4e4986g4192g4fbdgad06g5089ffaec9c9: Watch that tone, sweetie. You want to be in my good books - trust me.
h52b1f44bg3d6eg4b14g8522g0c1cb2049304: That wriggler in your head isn't going to get its damn self out, is it?
h12781082g2d39g4681g8900ge84a59383539: Let's start over, shall we? I'm Auntie Ethel.
h4ac302d6g4f55g45eag95d2gec771aa12114: You said you had something for the parasite?
hb0223907g2b43g4e75gb60eg7d300274632f: Of course! Ah, I'd lose my head if it wasn't attached to me. Now, I must confess - I told a bit of a white lie.
h91c9dbc7gb7cdg490fga50dg1c5f526adbf9: I said I had something at home that could help. Well, that something...
heaae4a92g9381g4ad6g8cf4g8776fb33e039: ... is me. Forgive me - didn't want the grove's prying eyes in my business.
h5eaab2cdg7034g40d0gbbd3g86baa695e95b: You must have mistaken me for someone else.
h4c820d83g2a17g4b19gb301g9f43d5f6243b: I don't think I did, dearie. And frankly you're thick for saying so.
h4ec71702g436bg4601ga6e5ged79edf820d2: You think you scare me? Please. I've met far worse than you in my time.
hf937715ag2276g48cag8c49gdb061b219015: My people took orders once. I'm not doing it again.
h9e85c868g59f5g4349gad84gbc9d55cd112f: But you'd look so good on your knees.
hee740b82g8055g48eegbe76g4641cf8e4c4f: Hah! Bet you wouldn't say that to Vlaakith. You're nothing but a scared child masquerading as a warrior.
hd4c6ea65gdd19g4c9bg904cgacd39b3cc3be: How shocking: another barbarian with all brawn and no brains.
h84354821gb90dg4d0bg8d77g05e8b52d6056: I appear to have forgotten my apology. How about a poem instead?
h32b806cbg121cg41a3gb875g26ce06e3aa01: Another bard who thinks humour is the same as talent - cute.
h4933e51fg237cg4dc5g8359ge95eac676067: I won't apologise to such a wicked creature.
h0b51e4a8gf15dg4627ga3cagf7d04811472f: Aw, is it hard to see from up there on your high horse? If only you knew some of the horrors your pretty little gods had committed...
h0d90c838gfb5bg41e8g9779g77d458f6f470: You don't scare me. I serve someone far more terrifying.
ha6c7bfdcg8398g46e9gaa17g3ec4de5355a9: Bhaal, right? He'll not bother us. He's far too busy using blood as fingerpaint and taking credit for other people's kills.
h283e606ag2c16g4fcbg999bg82f20b7b2bc6: Bane, right? The laziest tyrant of all. He sits on his backside while you lot run around doing all the work. Do you wipe his arse too? Hah!
h49e8ff45ge8fag40cbg87b8g22730c4418d0: Myrkul? Pretty rubbish god of death if you ask me. You're just an adorable little misery guts though.
h4d0f1901g36bag44baga4f9g79478909f047: Shar won't bother us here. She's far too busy writing poetry and crying about how much people prefer her sister.
h0571488dgbb18g456cgbb27g44e2dae1db7e: Oh, petal. If you think your precious little god holds any power here, you're in for a surpise.
hda77f997g897bg499cg81c3g2fabb6439569: Tell me, hag: is this intimidation part of the bargaining process? Or does that come after?
ha0e76184g9d3ag4e8dgad23gdff51df6105f: Aw, the wizard thinks he's smart because he can read. How precious.
h6605a01eg8587g4f8fg94dbg8b8cc47270d6: Ah, if it isn't my hero! You took ages. Come in - come in!
hc7b9434cg1afbg4777ga37fg910470d01de5: There I am in the grove, just trying to make ends meet, and you decide to give me a battering?!
h20c4bdddgee67g4e0bg8ad6ga4cd1418aa5d: Who is this? A friend of yours?
ha58bcc7dg10d3g4f35gaabfgbe786ad80a26: No! No, I don't know him.
h3847fe75gff62g4b68g8d26g3bad59883236: No! No, I don't know her.
hd0481f9bg6176g403egb85fg02cb591dc74e: Come now - aren't you going to introduce yourself?
h5da2f606gd6d5g497cgaaddg5b5fbf8c01b8: I'm Gale. Delighted to make your acquaintance.
h24dc773cg54adg4087ga459gbdfbc35340a8: Astarion - just delighted to meet you, madam.
h9d37c247g5a2eg4bdegb1f3gd004b686dab4: Oh, I like you - you may stay.
hef750fe5gaab4g4bdbg8feage95c8fd66f37: Feel free to relax for yourself and have a cuppa, hm?
h76dc916cg4127g453dg86e4g6a3c6d0d355b: Who I am is not important.
h24c58655g5e7eg406cg8c1bg382402852e09: True. What's important is why you're here - but we can figure that bit out together, petal.

ha8341835g9e82g4ee1ga875g0c3d482bc504: Usually people ask what, as opposed to who, I am.
h90bb550cg708fg4b23gb826g2bf0896ccf50: That's because most people are afraid of their own bloody shadows. Not me though. Auntie Ethel welcomes everyone.
h04bcd0f2g7173g42efgaa8fg676ff191fa5c: Spare me your pleasantries. Are drow even welcome here?
h9464199ag1067g48efg8655ge1ca50d8d851: Of course! As if I give a stuffing about what you are. Come in - come in.
h61a35dbdg19a9g4235gba06gb01c4e9eabba: Nope. Are duergar even welcome here?

hd35c1736g3b9dg42d3gaca0g566fccf984dc: Finally! See, girl? Now that's an introduction.
h2bdef576ge64cg4c77g8839gad8cf14c4e37: I prefer to keep a low profile.
h5c21e98bg099fg43d0g89d7gbd03f814648a: Cute and secretive? You're too much, petal.
hef7a7925g30c5g48afg85fdg1dd4283ac662: Ah, if it isn't my favourite flower! Welcome to Auntie Ethel's. Come in - come in!
hd4b1247fg08c3g4d92g9e08gdfc505847716: You going to give me one of those precious peepers?

h6059bd98gfd56g411fga810g7afa9f54d832: Here for whatever you need, petal.
